# mcp-studio
> **Complete guide to achieving and maintaining Gold Status on Glama.ai** --- 1. [Gold Status Achievement](GOLD_STATUS_ACHIEVEMENT.md) - **Original certification** (85/100) 2. [Gold Status Update 2025-1...

This project includes automated llms.txt generation for AI accessibility.

- [Readme](docs\glama-platform\README.md): **Complete guide to achieving and maintaining Gold Status on Glama.ai**

- [Readme](docs\mcp-technical\README.md): **Technical guides for MCP server development, deployment, and troubleshooting**
- [Readme](docs\github\README.md): > **Purpose**: Comprehensive GitHub configuration guide to avoid hours of trial-and-error setup.

- [Readme](docs\development\README.md): **Guides, best practices, and lessons learned for developing notepadpp-mcp**
- [Readme](docs\repository-protection\README.md): **Complete guide to keeping your notepadpp-mcp repository safe**

## Api
- [Discovery](src\mcp_studio\app\api\discovery.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [Clients](src\mcp_studio\app\api\clients.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [  Init  ](src\api\__init__.py): Api definitions and implementations
- [Servers](src\mcp_studio\app\api\endpoints\servers.py): Endpoints definitions and implementations
- [Websocket](src\mcp_studio\app\api\endpoints\websocket.py): Endpoints definitions and implementations
- [Mcp Servers](src\mcp_studio\app\api\endpoints\mcp_servers.py): Endpoints definitions and implementations
- [Repo Routes](src\mcp_studio\api\repo_routes.py): Routes definitions and implementations
- [Smoke Test Routes](src\mcp_studio\api\smoke_test_routes.py): Routes definitions and implementations
- [Group Routes](src\mcp_studio\api\group_routes.py): Routes definitions and implementations
- [User](src\mcp_studio\app\models\user.py): Models definitions and implementations
- [Mcp](src\mcp_studio\app\models\mcp.py): Models definitions and implementations
- [Server](src\mcp_studio\app\models\server.py): Models definitions and implementations
